PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?player(COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  wd:Q37285 wdt:P527 ?stage .
  ?stage wdt:P527 ?match .
  ?match wdt:P1846 ?player .
}
GROUP BY ?player
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
